name: PagerDuty
summary: Read incidents + on-call schedules and (with approval) ack/resolve.
description: Retrieve incident data, see who's on call, and create/ack/resolve incidents. Pairs with the incident-scanner agent to give a real, write-capable incident surface. Uses PagerDuty's official MCP server (hosted OAuth, or self-hosted token).

requires.label: A PagerDuty account + auth (hosted OAuth or a self-hosted API token)
